title: Cobblemon Type Table
description: This mod adds the Pokémon type effectiveness chart - Compatible with Cobblemon and Pixelmon.
body:
You can follow development, devlogs, and future updates for free **[here 📝](https://www.patreon.com/collection/2146365?view=expanded)** And if you'd like to support the project you can grab me a [**Ko-fi** ☕](https://ko-fi.com/javieljefe) [![Cover](https://i.imgur.com/83QcmPt.png)](https://www.patreon.com/posts/157868171)

Mod Collection ⚔️

   

--- # **Type Effectiveness Chart** This is a simple mod that adds the Pokémon type effectiveness chart into Minecraft. It **works alongside [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)** and **[Pixelmon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pixelmon)**, or any other mod! ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- - The type chart can be opened by right-clicking the item in hand. - It can also be opened with the default key H (configurable in Controls - Keybinds). - 8 different colors for the type table. - Icons can be displayed with or without borders, toggleable in-game under mod options or directly in the config file (cobblemontypechart-common.toml). - To change it directly in-game, you need **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**. ## Type Table In-game type chart. ![In-game type table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a59198d547c234dc8d1552d6187d5ee8b9c1f4bb.png) ## Tooltips Hover over a type icon to view its effectiveness. ![A visual reference for the tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22be43c72dbc4e6926103200f34c65b0dc95d70d.png) ## Recipe Crafting recipe (2 paper + 1 iron ingot) + dye for different color. ![The in-game recipe for the new item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320c3f35a05b55b65b599fba57e1b49db4a98a39.png) **This mod is entirely client-side and works on any vanilla or modded server**. **Note**: The type chart may appear blurry if you’re not using **shaders** with **Iris**, **OptiFine**, or similar mods. To fix this issue without shaders, go to Video Settings - **Menu Background Blur** and set it to **OFF**.
